title: senecillis ruficoma
intro: Senecillis ruficoma, also known as Groundsel Tree, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The Groundsel Tree is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and protecting against infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Groundsel Tree can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
